statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next Owner Workflow Upgrade slice: guarded Garage backup restore.

Changed:
- Added `Choose Backup` / `Restore Backup` controls in [garage.html](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/garage.html:87).
- Added validation, preview, malformed-file rejection, diagnostic-handoff rejection, and restore/reset behavior in [garage.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/garage.js:389).
- Exported a guarded restore helper in [garage-data.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/garage-data.js:199).
- Added restore/import search coverage, browser-smoke assertions, cache bump to `ridgeline-console-v268`, and updated Anton state/backlog/roadmap/audit notes.

Verified:
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- Playwright Chrome fallback passed on iPhone width and desktop.
- Checked malformed JSON, diagnostic activity JSON rejection, valid backup preview, restore enable/disable behavior, restored notes/profile/photo metadata without local image data URLs, no horizontal overflow, and `restore garage backup` search.
- Captured `audit-v268-*` screenshots in `debug-screenshots/`.

Known issue unchanged: `Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1 -Pages @('garage.html')` still fails in this shell because Edge `--dump-dom` renders without the main landmark; Playwright verification was used as the documented fallback.

Next safe slice: review Garage restore with a real backup file on the userâ€™s iPhone, then decide whether conflict-aware merge/replace choices are worth adding.
